protein_name: Receptor for TNFSF5/CD40LG. Transduces TRAF6- and MAP3K8-mediated signals that activate ERK in macrophages and B cells, leading to induction of immunoglobulin secretion. B-cells and in primary carcinomas. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
